---
title: "Pillars of the House, or, Under Wode, Under Rode, The. 4 vols."
---

## Pillars of the House, or, Under Wode, Under Rode, The. 4 vols.

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1874
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London and New York: Macmillan and Company.

### Notes

Characters from <i>Countess Kate</i>, <i>The Pillars of the House</i> and <i>The Castle Builders</i> appear in this novel.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
